zh.Mortemer, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandi: 法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利莫莫
zh.Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Upper Normandy: 法國豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Monfort II於1020年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾時，他的父親Sir Gilbert De Gaunt-27歲，母親Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle-30歲。他於1049年與Alice Beaufour在法國豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1054年登記服兵役。他於1067年被列為constable of england。他去世於1088年在英國享年68歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Monfort II于1020年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾时，他的父亲Sir Gilbert De Gaunt-27岁，母亲Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle-30岁。他于1049年与Alice Beaufour在法国豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1054年登记服兵役。他于1067年被列为constable of england。他去世于1088年在英国享年68岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Monfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Montfort
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Mont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Juan, Cristina, Domingo, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Mariano, Ramon, Trinidad.
Catalan and French: topographic name for a mountain dweller, from Catalan and (Old) French mont ‘mountain’ (from Latin mons, genitive montis). Compare French Demont and Dumont .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Monfort II was born in 1020, in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Sir Gilbert De Gaunt, was -27 and his mother, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, was -30. He married Alice Beaufour in 1049, in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1054. In 1067, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as constable of england. He died in 1088, in England, at the age of 68, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Monfort II est né en 1020, à Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Sir Gilbert De Gaunt, avait -27 ans et sa mère, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, avait -30 ans. Il a épousé Alice Beaufour en 1049, à Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1054. En 1067, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of england. Il est décédé en 1088, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Monfort II 1020 in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gilbert De Gaunt -27 und seine Mutter Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle -30. Er hat 1049 in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Alice Beaufour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1054 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1067, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of england aufgeführt. Er starb 1088 im Alter von 68 Jahren in England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Monfort II è nato il nel 1020 nel Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Sir Gilbert De Gaunt, aveva -27 anni e il suo madre, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, aveva -30 anni. Lui sposato Alice Beaufour nel 1049, nel Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1054. Nel 1067, all'età di 47 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of england. Morì nel 1088, nel England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Monfort IIが1020年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアモントフォート-スル-リスルで生まれた時，父Sir Gilbert De Gauntは-27歳，母Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risleは-30歳であった。1049年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアモントフォート-スル-リスルでAlice Beaufourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1054年に兵役登録をした。1067年，47歳の時，職業はconstable of englandと記録されている。彼は1088年にイギリスで68歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Monfort II(이)가 1020년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 몽포트-수-리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gilbert De Gaunt(은)는 -27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle(은)는 -30세였다. 그는 1049년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 몽포트-수-리슬일에서 Alice Beaufour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1054년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1067년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 constable of england이었다. 그는 1088년 영국에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Monfort II nasceu em 1020, em Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Sir Gilbert De Gaunt, tinha -27 anos e sua mãe, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, tinha -30 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Beaufour em 1049, em Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1054. Em 1067, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of england. Ele faleceu em 1088, em Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Monfort II родился в 1020 г. в местности монтфорт-сур-рисл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir Gilbert De Gaunt было -27 год, а матери, которую звали Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, -30. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Beaufour в 1049 г. в местности монтфорт-сур-рисл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1054 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1067 году, в возрасте 47 лет, работал по профессии constable of england. Он умер в 1088 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Monfort II nació en 1020, en Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Sir Gilbert De Gaunt, tenía -27 años y su mamá, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, tenía -30 años. Se casó con Alice Beaufour en 1049, en Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1054. En 1067, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of england. Murió en 1088, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
